title: Mutant's and More Addon for FSang18's Heropack
description: For now this addon expands upon FSang18's Mutant "Mimicry".
body:
This is an Addon for FSang18's Heropack which just expands a little on whats available in the pack currently. 

Currently this Addon adds "Tokens" which allow you to unlock abilities for the Mutant power "mimicry".

Blank Mimicry Tokens can be found only in Desert Temples.

There is a rare chance to find some high tier Ability Tokens in End City chests.

(i do not own the rights to the token textures in this pack, they belong to FSang18, thank you FSang for letting me use your textures)![Proof that i have been given permission to use FSang18's Assets]

Feel free to join my discord to see what im up to with my main pack -    [https://discord.gg/ssGtdZyS8s](https://discord.gg/ssGtdZyS8s)
